critical_issues.description: Gary Roenicke was NOT a 1985 New York Yankee. He played for the Baltimore Orioles in 1985 and did not join the Yankees until 1986. Including him violates AC #5 (historical accuracy).
critical_issues.recommendation: Replace Gary Roenicke with Bobby Brown (OF/CF, #1), who was on the 1985 Yankees roster as a backup outfielder.
critical_issues.status: RESOLVED — replaced with Bobby Brown (#1, CF)

critical_issues.description: Gary Roenicke's position was listed as 'OF' (generic), inconsistent with all other outfielders in the file which use specific codes (LF, CF, RF).
critical_issues.recommendation: Use specific outfield position code (LF, CF, or RF) for all outfielders.

suggestions.description: No test file consumed the fixture — AC #4 (fixture used for known-player assertions) was unverified.
suggestions.recommendation: Add tests/test_fixture_roster_1985_yankees.py that loads the JSON, validates structure, and asserts anchor players.

suggestions.description: SP/RP are non-standard position codes (standard is P). No breaking change today since spec.md defines position as a plain string, but could conflict with future validator.
suggestions.recommendation: Document that SP/RP are the chosen convention so any future validator is aligned.
suggestions.status: ACCEPTED AS-IS — SP/RP are kept to distinguish role; test added to prevent generic 'OF' but not to enforce SP/RP convention

suggestions.description: Activity log contained an unreplaced {PR} template placeholder.
suggestions.recommendation: Substitute with actual PR number or remove placeholder.
suggestions.status: RESOLVED — activity log updated with actual findings file reference
